category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Csound as a sound and music computing system.
source_facts.homepage is the official Csound website.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name, source_facts.homepage, and official documentation use Csound capitalization.
docs_sources: Official Csound website hosts the Csound manual under /docs/manual/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/csound/csound; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify an audio/music synthesis and processing system.
